Name (Check out the Tracker website!):
A$AP Rocky - Babytalk [V2]
(prod. Kelvin Krash)
Notes (Join the Discord for updates and: Original version of the song "Babytalk" that was owned by Mod which was solo and did not yet feature Baby Keem. After previously previewing the song "Babytalk" twice Rocky brought Baby Keem in as a feature. It has been rumored to have likely been recorded not too long before the song was previewed given the unfinished state of Baby Keem's vocals. The song was played during a private party held on September 10th, 2022 along with another unreleased song with Kingpin Skinny Pimp. The song was first previewed at Lyrical Lemonade Summer Smash 2021 on August 20th, 2021 and then later previewed again at Life is Beautiful 2021 on September 19th, 2021 before he would eventually add Baby Keem to the track as a feature. A high quality snippet was leaked on June 10th, 2024 and the full song was leaked after a $380 groupbuy on June 18th, 2024.
